title: Entity Identifier
text: Entity Identifier ASCII string that marks the beginning of an included entity. Description Use this definition only if the Identification Type species that a string identifier will be used, either alone or in combination with a binary length. For non-printing ASCII, use the decimal value (for example, ^28 ). Applies to Modeled Entity Interface Related Links Data Storage Field interface definitions, as defined in the Database Interface property, determine how data is stored in a specific DBMS storage format, and how Uniface deals with the data when it is retrieved. The definitions specify the Uniface data type and packing code, which are mapped by the DBMS connector to the DBMS data type, known as a storage format. Identification Type Method used to identify the beginning of an included entities and occurrences using variable length techniques. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
